arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand Answers the Erling Haaland vs Kylian Mbappe Debate
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe and Erling Haaland are two of the best players in world football as things stand - but Rio Ferdinand believes one is better.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid set for formation change as Ancelotti looks to shore up defence?
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti is reportedly considering making a significant change to his team's formation in an attempt to tighten up his defence and give Kylian Mbappe more freedom.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Madrid vs Espanyol, 2024 La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Espanyol in La Liga. Both games should be manageable for Los Blancos, who need to keep gaining confidence and momentum ahead of next week's Madrid Derby at the Metropolitano.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid plot double wonderkid deal after Yoro disappointment
arts.sum: Real Madrid are eyeing up two wonderkid defenders for 2025 after missing out on Leny Yoro. After the signing of Kylian Mbappe, Los Blancos focused their energy on securing Lille centre-back Leny Yoro in the summer, but the European champions ultimately missed out.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid set sights on Yarek & Vitor Reis
arts.sum: The powers that be at La Liga giants Real Madrid have identified a pair of potential long-term additions to the club’s defensive ranks. That’s according to Diario AS, who have…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Long-serving player in line to pen contract extension?
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly closing in on the contract extension of one of their longest-serving players.

arts.ttl: Key Real Madrid trio tipped to drop to bench for Espanyol clash
arts.sum: Three leading members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid are in line to drop to the bench for the club’s next outing. That’s according to Blancos…

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid consider move for €45m defender
arts.sum: If Madrid move for Yarek, it is likely that they would need to negotiate with Valencia as they are reluctant to pay a large sum up front. Real Madrid are said to be monitoring Valencia's Yarek Gasiorowski in their search for a new centre-back.

arts.ttl: Which four Real Madrid players are unavailable against Espanyol?
arts.sum: Real Madrid will be without the services of four players for Saturday's La Liga clash with Espanyol.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid fear 'Yoro repeat' with top target
arts.sum: The Bayern Munich left-back is out of contract next summer, as Yoro would have been, and the LaLiga champions have positioned themselves to sign him on a free transfer after refusing to make a formal bid during the previous window. According to Relevo, Real Madrid still find themselves in pole position to land Davies, but they are well aware that Premier League clubs are also circling.
